steps.title: Move from rule to case
steps.content: The first sentence gives a general principle: sleek vehicles are more aerodynamic than bulky ones. The F-4 Phantom II is then used as a specific case that illustrates that principle.

steps.title: Reject mismatched links
steps.content: Choice A signals contrast even though the jet supports the principle. Choice B suggests simultaneous events, and Choice D merely adds another point. The blank needs an example signal. The answer is C.
